headline: Lululemon Expands Mexican Footprint To Test Community Led Growth Model
summary: Lululemon athletica (NasdaqGS:LULU) plans to open about 15 new stores across North America. The expansion includes eight new locations in Mexico, adding to the company’s presence in that market. The rollout is paired with brand activations such as high profile races and ambassador summits to deepen local engagement. Lululemon athletica, best known for its premium athletic apparel and accessories, is pushing further into North America at a time when cross border retail and community focused...
